name: Potter
description: Shapes earth and fire into the vessels a community eats from, drinks from, and stores everything in. Underappreciated until something breaks.
dialogue_hooks: offering a pot at a fair price — everyone needs pots
asking about clay they've heard is found in a specific area
telling you about something strange found in the clay pit
muttering about a kiln firing that went wrong in an unusual way
voice_patterns: quiet and steady — speaks like someone used to working alone
warm community pillar — knows everyone because everyone needs pots
gruff artisan — doesn't suffer fools or cheap clay
curious naturalist — fascinated by what the earth produces

schedule.night: watching kiln temperature, sleeping in shifts
